debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
hf_bounded : ∀ (x : ↑(spectrum ℂ a)), ‖f x‖ ≤ C
hX : Measurable f
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C

failed_attempts:
have h1 : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤
      (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ := by
    apply ComplexMeasure.integral_norm_le_of_bound
    exact hX
  have h2 : (⨆ x, ‖f x‖) ≤ C := by
    apply csSup_le
    · exact Set.nonempty_univ
    · intro z _
      exact hf_bounded z
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤
        (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ := h1
    _ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C := by gcongr
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by gcongr; apply cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded

have h1 : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤
      (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖,
    from ComplexMeasure.integral_norm_le_of_bounded hX
  have h2 : ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ C,
    from csSup_le (by intro x; exact norm_nonneg _) hf_bounded
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖
      ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ := h1
    _ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h2
        (ComplexMeasure.variation_nonneg _ _)
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
        have h3 : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖,
          from cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
        exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h3 (by positivity)

have h₁ : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤
      (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ := by
    apply ComplexMeasure.integral_bound
  have h₂ : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by

  have h₃ : ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ ≤ C := by

    · intro z _
      exact hf_bounded z
  calc

    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by gcongr

  have h2 : ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ C := by

        (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ := h1
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ := by gcongr
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by gcongr

have h1 : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖,
    from ComplexMeasure.integral_norm_le_variation_mul_snorm (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) f hX
  have h2 : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖,
    from cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  have h3 : ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ C,
    from csSup_le (Set.nonempty_coe_sort.mpr (spectrum_nonempty ℂ a)) hf_bounded
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ := h1
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h2 (csSup_nonneg _ (fun _ => norm_nonneg _))
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h3 (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))

have h1 : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖,
    from ComplexMeasure.integral_norm_le_variation_mul_sup hf_bounded hX
  have h2 : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖,
    from cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  have h3 : ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ C,
    from csSup_le (by positivity) hf_bounded
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ := h1
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ := by gcongr
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by gcongr

have h1 : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤
      (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ := by
    apply ComplexMeasure.integral_bound
  have h2 : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
    exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  have h3 : ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ ≤ C := by
    apply csSup_le
    · exact Set.nonempty_coe_sort
    · intro z _
      exact hf_bounded z
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤
        (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ := h1
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ := by gcongr
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by gcongr

have h1 : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖,
    from ComplexMeasure.integral_norm_le_variation_mul_sSup_norm hX
  have h2 : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖,
    from cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  have h3 : ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ C,
    from csSup_le (by positivity) hf_bounded
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ x, ‖f x‖ := h1
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by gcongr

have h1 : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤
      (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ := by
    apply ComplexMeasure.integral_bound
  have h2 : ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ ≤ C := by
    apply csSup_le
    · exact Set.nonempty_univ
    · intro z _
      exact hf_bounded z
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤
        (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ⨆ (x : spectrum ℂ a), ‖f x‖ := h1
    _ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h2
        (ComplexMeasure.variation_nonneg _ _)
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
        have h3 : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
          apply cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded
        exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h3 (by positivity)

have h1 := ComplexMeasure.integral_bound_of_norm_le_const (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) f C hf_bounded hX
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C := h1
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
      have h2 := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
      exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h2 (by positivity)
